form.label: Pi-hole Operations
form.description: Collector health, blocking state, service status, resource data, and raw log diagnostics.

search.query: `pihole_queries` pihole_node="$node$" | stats max(_time) as last_seen | eval age_seconds=round(now()-last_seen,0) | fields age_seconds
`pihole_metrics` metric_name=blocking pihole_node="$node$" | spath path=data.blocking output=blocking | stats latest(blocking) as blocking
`pihole_metrics` metric_name=messages pihole_node="$node$" | spath path=data.messages output=messages | stats latest(messages) as messages

`pihole_metrics` metric_name=summary pihole_node="$node$" | spath path=data.queries.total output=total | spath path=data.queries.blocked output=blocked | spath path=data.queries.percent_blocked output=percent_blocked | spath path=data.queries.forwarded output=forwarded | spath path=data.queries.cached output=cached | spath path=data.queries.frequency output=frequency | stats latest(total) as total latest(blocked) as blocked latest(percent_blocked) as percent_blocked latest(forwarded) as forwarded latest(cached) as cached latest(frequency) as queries_per_second latest(_time) as last_seen by pihole_node | convert ctime(last_seen)
index=pihole (sourcetype=pihole:query:json OR sourcetype=pihole:metric:json) pihole_node="$node$" | timechart span=5m count by sourcetype
index=pihole (sourcetype=pihole:dns OR sourcetype=pihole:ftl OR sourcetype=pihole:web) host="$node$" | timechart span=5m count by sourcetype
index=pihole event_type=collector_error pihole_node="$node$" | table _time collector error | sort - _time
index=pihole sourcetype=pihole:ftl host="$node$" (log_level=WARNING OR log_level=ERROR OR log_level=FATAL OR "WARN" OR "ERROR") | table _time host log_level _raw | sort - _time
`pihole_metrics` pihole_node="$node$" | stats latest(_raw) as payload latest(_time) as last_seen by pihole_node metric_name endpoint | convert ctime(last_seen) | sort metric_name
